summary: Stabilize authenticity tiers (primary_truth + unassigned) after the 2025-10 alert streak by auditing guard receipts and wiring the follow-up remediation steps.

steps.title: Audit guard receipts + confirm degradation source
steps.notes: Guardrails captured the alert (ethics receipts dated 2025-11-09); steward acknowledged and analyzed the drop.

steps.title: Rebaseline authenticity telemetry + implement remediation
steps.notes: Documented remediation workflow + receipt contract (authenticity report, escalation logging, guard verification).

checkpoint.description: Authenticity tiers remain above threshold for both primary_truth and unassigned feeds with receipts proving remediation.
checkpoint.notes: tools.external.authenticity_report run 2025-11-09T17:04Z shows primary_truth=0.85, unassigned=0.68 after remediation receipts.
